summary: Frontend-only testing of UI/UX improvements on Shop and Services pages. All tests passed (100% success rate). X icon import fix verified, text sizes improved, card styling with rounded corners/shadows/borders confirmed, pillar navigation working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ShopPage.jsx - ProductCard component has proper styling with rounded-2xl/3xl, shadow-md, border classes
ServicesPage.jsx - X icon correctly imported from lucide-react on line 21
ServicesPage.jsx - ServiceCard component has proper styling with rounded-2xl/3xl, shadow-md, border classes
Both pages have improved text sizes (text-xs, text-sm, text-base, text-lg) for better readability on mobile
Cards have hover effects with hover:shadow-2xl and hover:-translate-y-1 for visual feedback
Mira whisper text displays correctly on both product and service cards
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shop and Services pages UI/UX improvements verified. Both pages load correctly, display cards with proper styling (rounded corners, shadows, borders, hover effects), show Mira whisper text, and have working pillar navigation. The X icon import in ServicesPage.jsx is correctly imported from lucide-react and renders properly in the breed search input clear button.

features_tested.x_icon_import_renders: PASS - X icon shows correctly in breed search clear button
features_tested.product_cards_display: PASS - Title, price, Mira whisper all visible
features_tested.service_cards_display: PASS - Name, price/quote, duration, Mira whisper all visible
features_tested.shop_pillar_navigation: PASS - Tested: celebrate, dine, stay, care, enjoy, fit, learn
features_tested.services_pillar_navigation: PASS - Tested: care, learn, stay, fit, travel, celebrate, advisory, emergency
features_tested.card_styling: PASS - Cards have rounded-2xl/3xl, shadow-md/hover:shadow-2xl, border-gray-100
features_tested.mobile_responsive: PASS - Text sizes improved from text-[10px] to text-xs/text-sm
features_tested.breed_search_filter: PASS - Dropdown works, X clear button renders correctly
